section.title: Common questions, clear answers
section.subtitle: Still wondering? Reach out and we'll be glad to help.

items.question: How do I request a quote?
items.answer: Use the form on this page, call us at (555) 010-3344, or text 'QUOTE' to the same number. Most quotes come back within an hour during business days.

items.question: Do you offer same-day service?
items.answer: Yes — for most service categories we offer same-day availability when you book before 11 AM. Emergency dispatch is available 24/7.

items.question: Are you licensed and insured?
items.answer: Absolutely. Northline Service Co. is fully licensed in Ohio and carries $2M in general liability plus workers' comp coverage on every job.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We serve Cedar Falls and the surrounding communities within a 30-mile radius. See the Service Areas section for the full list.

items.question: Do you provide free estimates?
items.answer: Yes. Quotes and on-site estimates for most projects are 100% free with no obligation. Specialty assessments may carry a small fee, applied to your project if you book.
